ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "cpt" TEXT /* Standard code for the test (CPT) */,
  "modifier" TEXT /* Modifier for the test (if needed) */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or instructions for the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., blood, urine, tissue) */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample required for the test */,
  "turnaround_time" INTEGER /* Turnaround time for the test in hours */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test panel */,
  "panel_name" TEXT /* Name of the test panel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_panel_tests" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test panel */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id", "test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the order belongs to */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "ordered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ordered the test */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of sample collection (e.g., venipuncture, urine collection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ordered_by FOREIGN KEY ("ordered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the insurance provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the invoice belongs to */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, laboratory technician, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
